title: Os' Creepto Currency
description: This pack changes non-waterlogged (dead) sea pickles to stacks of Creepto coins of your choice of color(s). Versions: One of 8 colors, all colors, gems only, or metals only.
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack can do 2 things: add Creepto Currency coin stacks in place of non-waterlogged sea pickles, and/or change each material's item texture to be that of creepto currency.
Waterlogged sea pickles have not been changed.
Each quantity (1-4) of sea pickles has a new model that is randomly rotated.
Choose one of the 8 colors, all the colors, the 4 gems pack, or the 4 metals pack. No Optifine needed. ### Example of "Items Only" pack:
Please note: Currently the only option for the items pack is to have all materials replaced as opposed to having custom combinations like with the sea pickles version. This will likely not be changed in the future, unless multiple players request it.
![Items Only](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76626c147f193742c43797f3ab71771be0670792.png)

### Example of "Sea Pickle Replacement" packs: | One Color
![Picture of the pack icon](https://i.imgur.com/NkHkvcd.gif) | ALL Colors
![Picture of the pack icon](https://i.imgur.com/C01gnxY.png) | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:| | Gems Only
![Picture of the pack icon](https://i.imgur.com/iA6TdBe.png) | Metals Only
![Picture of the pack icon](https://i.imgur.com/pP8iVxZ.png) | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:| [![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis) # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page. Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/) [![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/zqkNdbZ.png)](https://emilybau.com) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
